title: Remote Procedure Call (RPC) Security Version 3
abstract: This document specifies version 3 of the Remote Procedure Call (RPC) security protocol (RPCSEC_GSS).  This protocol provides support for multi-principal authentication of client hosts and user principals to a server (constructed by generic composition), security label assertions for multi-level security and type enforcement, structured privilege assertions, and channel bindings.  This document updates RFC 5403.
